Gong Jing ÈæîÊôØ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Jing (ÈæîÊôØ). Imperial Protector of Qingzhou. Attacked by the Yellow Scarves. Supported by Liu Bei. Gong Jing may not have existed in history. Gong Jing was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
